name: GridSnap Terrain Editor
description: Snaps part placement to a configurable voxel grid for precision terrain and dungeon building.
installSteps: Open Roblox Studio and go to the Toolbox panel.
Search for "GridSnap Terrain Editor" or paste the plugin ID 9284710213.
Click Install, then reload Studio to activate the toolbar button.
Open the GridSnap panel from the Plugins tab and set your grid size.
features: Configurable voxel grid from 0.5 to 16 studs
Snap-to-surface raycasting for uneven terrain
Undo-safe batch placement for up to 500 parts
Live grid overlay rendered in the 3D viewport

name: NPC Pathweave AI
description: Behavior-tree driven NPC pathfinding with patrol, chase, and flee states out of the box.
installSteps: Insert the PathweaveAI ModuleScript into ServerScriptService.
Require the module in your NPC controller script.
Call Pathweave.new(npcModel, behaviorConfig) to spawn an agent.
Tune waypoints via the in-Studio Pathweave inspector widget.
features: Behavior tree with Patrol, Chase, Flee, and Idle nodes
Automatic waypoint graph generation from PathfindingService
Line-of-sight detection with configurable cone angle
Hot-swappable behavior configs without server restart

name: RetopoFlow Lite
description: Fast quad-based retopology brush set for cleaning up sculpted high-poly meshes.
installSteps: Download the retopoflow_lite.zip release asset.
In Blender, go to Edit > Preferences > Add-ons > Install.
Select the zip file and enable the checkbox next to RetopoFlow Lite.
Access the tool from the N-panel under the new Retopo tab.
features: Quad-strip brush with adjustable relax strength
Auto-snap to high-poly surface via shrinkwrap modifier
Symmetry-aware stroke mirroring on X/Y/Z
One-click bake of resulting mesh to a new object

name: Procedural Foliage Kit
description: Geometry-nodes based scatter system for realistic grass, bushes, and tree distribution.
installSteps: Install the .blend asset library via the Blender Asset Browser.
Enable the Procedural Foliage Kit add-on in Preferences.
Drag the Foliage Scatter node group onto your terrain mesh.
Adjust density and wind sway values in the modifier panel.
features: Geometry nodes scatter with density painting support
Built-in wind sway animation driver
Distance-based LOD swapping for viewport performance
12 preset foliage sets: grass, ferns, shrubs, and trees

changelog.message: High instance count may affect viewport FPS
Wind sway driver linked to Scene.frame_current

name: QuantumHUD Framework
description: Lightweight, modular HUD resource with NUI-based speedometer, health, and minimap widgets.
installSteps: Copy the quantumhud folder into your server's resources directory.
Add ensure quantumhud to your server.cfg.
Configure widget positions in config/hud_layout.lua.
Restart the resource with restart quantumhud in the server console.
features: NUI-rendered widgets with GPU-accelerated animations
Per-widget visibility toggles synced to player state
Exportable API for other resources to push HUD notifications
Adaptive layout for 16:9, 21:9, and 4:3 aspect ratios

changelog.message: Syncing grid geometry for minimap tiles...
Non-mesh selection detected in vehicle HUD hook
Speedometer bound to entity state bag

name: Dynamic Economy Bridge
description: Cross-framework economy bridge that syncs banking, jobs, and inventory between ESX and QBCore.
installSteps: Place the econ_bridge resource above your framework resource in server.cfg.
Set FRAMEWORK = 'esx' or 'qbcore' in shared/config.lua.
Run the included SQL migration against your database.
Restart the server to initialize the bridge exports.
features: Unified export API: bridge:getMoney, bridge:addJob, bridge:getInventory
Automatic schema migration between ESX and QBCore tables
Transaction logging with rollback on failed bank transfers
Webhook support for real-time economy audit logging

changelog.message: Migration failed on table qb_inventory, retrying
